        "A": "6, ['Education Partnership Incentive / Education Access bundle offering school district liaison services', 'Property Search Concierge service and Premium Management monthly support – not part of any defined service_type or included_features', 'School district certification and verification support – educational boundary handling not in schema', 'International Legal Package – cross-border transaction support not covered under service_type', 'Education-focused relocation support with school placement assistance – no education or school-related category', 'Bundled comparison request combining financing and education benefits – cross-category evaluation not representable']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Traditional Mortgage option with down payment, interest rate, fees, and amortization period – fits financing_options fields', 'Home-Upgrade Incentive Mortgage (first-time buyer scheme) with variable rate – fits financing_options', 'Self-Employed Flex Mortgage with flexible documentation – fits financing_options.documentation_required', 'Detached 4-bedroom Oakville home property details – fits property_listings', 'Legal service packages (Basic, Premium, International) with costs and turnaround times – fits service_packages with service_type=legal', 'Disbursements and title insurance costs – fits financing_options.title_insurance and legal_fees', 'Moving service levels (Standard, Premium, Corporate Relocation) – fits moving_services with levels and specialization', 'Utility setup options (Basic, Premium, Smart Home) – fits utility_services with cost, services_included, and smart_home_integration', 'Availability for scheduling within 10 business days – fits utility_services.setup_timeline_days', 'White-glove and unpacking features in moving services – fits included_features and moving_services fields', 'Insurance coverage and storage coordination in moving services – fits moving_services.special_requirements_supported', 'Package cost summaries and combined relocation estimates – fits total_package_summary fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
